movie_title: Xianxia Sword Immortal and Celestial Fairy Premium Continuous 4K LTX Cut
prompt_prefix: Premium photoreal live-action Chinese xianxia feature film, shot as one continuous cinematic story rather than separate prompt demos. Natural actor faces, realistic skin texture, real hair strands, believable silk and metal ornament materials, physically grounded lighting, atmospheric depth, restrained high-end VFX, coherent geography, coherent screen direction, and smooth cause-and-effect action. Keep the same two lead characters throughout: the male lead is a young Chinese sword immortal with a sharp elegant face, straight black hair, pale skin, calm controlled expression, white-and-pale-blue robes with silver embroidery, and a dark sword; the female lead is a beautiful Chinese celestial fairy with a refined oval face, long dark hair, soft brown eyes, a delicate silver crown, pale silver-blue gauze robes, jeweled details, and an ethereal but realistic human presence. Preserve exact identity, age, face structure, hairstyle, costume palette, robe silhouette, emotional relationship, lighting continuity, and live-action realism across every shot.
prompt_suffix: The shot must continue naturally from the previous clip when one exists: begin from the previous final frame, keep the same body positions and motion direction, then advance the story with cinematic camera movement. No montage reset, no returning to the reference portrait, no still-image slideshow, no unrelated new opening pose. 4K live-action historical fantasy cinematography, sharp but natural detail, stable faces, coherent motion, realistic cloth motion, consistent color grading, no style drift.
negative_prompt: anime, animated, cartoon, cel shading, illustration, painting, concept art, game cinematic, stylized fantasy splash art, plastic skin, doll face, waxy skin, fake eyes, oversized eyes, face drift, identity drift, costume drift, age drift, duplicate person, fox ears, animal tail, duplicate tails, malformed anatomy, extra limbs, bad hands, blur, low detail, muddy textures, temporal flicker, heavy CG look, jump cut, hard reset, scene reset, repeated reference pose, starting from reference portrait, static portrait, slideshow, unrelated location change, inconsistent screen direction, broken continuity, watermark, logo, text
